Hero.Title: match analysis with a virtual coach

Authorization.Log_in_or_create: Log in or create a profile
Authorization.Agreement_end: to the terms of use of the trading platform and refund

1.title: ANALYSIS
1.description: A virtual coach can analyze each player's performance data and provide personalized recommendations tailored to their unique needs and playing style

2.title: PERSONALITY
2.description: The virtual coach adapts to each player's individual needs and playing style, analyzes player performance data, and provides personalized recommendations

3.title: AVAILABILITY
3.description: A virtual coach with AI is available to players 24/7. This allows players to receive help, support, and recommendations anytime, anywhere

Coach.title: MORE THAN A COACH
Coach.description: It is your personal assistant, data analyst and motivation source, available 24/7. He's not just a coach, he's your partner in achieving your football goals

1.description: A presentation has been developed and presented to investors, showcasing the project concept and potential.

2.description: Research and verification of various theories have been conducted to identify the most promising ideas for implementation.

3.description: The development of the website has begun, including the functionality of a news carousel and video upload mechanism.

4.description: The next steps for the development of the project have been identified, including the refinement of the website, the improvement of AI functionality and the continuation of the search for investments

1.text: Track your skills and learn how to improve them

Shoot_Match.title: RECORD THE MATCH ON YOUR PHONE

minimum.title: Minimum Requirements
minimum.os: Operating System: Android 4.3 or higher, iOS 9.0 or higher

recommended.title: Recommended Requirements
recommended.os: Operating System: Android 6.0 or higher, iOS 13.0 or higher
